{{CargoRelic
|name=Sagittarius
|class_id=21937
|rank=SSS
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=As I, the writer, stare at the shiny icon and contemplate about its unique effect, I recall how this Relic was obtained. Instead of coming up with a proper description, I just want to say:
Coins around, honor bound; Name and gain, both renowned.
|fame=107
|art=48
|fth=70
|civ=71
|tech=66
|ss1=Snail HARD Stats +1000<br>Snail All ELMT DMG +100<br>Eternity Treasure, Energy Recovery Speed +5%<br>Eternity Treasure, 5% chance to gain extra progress +1 per draw
|ss2=Snail HARD Stats +1000<br>Snail All ELMT DMG +100<br>Eternity Treasure, Energy Recovery Speed +5%<br>Eternity Treasure, 5% chance to gain extra progress +1 per draw
|ss3=Snail HARD Stats +1000<br>Snail All ELMT DMG +100<br>Eternity Treasure, Energy Recovery Speed +5%<br>Eternity Treasure, 5% chance to gain extra progress +1 per draw
|ss4=Snail HARD Stats +1000<br>Snail All ELMT DMG +100<br>Eternity Treasure, Energy Recovery Speed +5%<br>Eternity Treasure, 5% chance to gain extra progress +1 per draw
|ss5=Snail HARD Stats +1000<br>Snail All ELMT DMG +100<br>Eternity Treasure, Energy Recovery Speed +5%<br>Eternity Treasure, 5% chance to gain extra progress +1 per draw
|ss6=Snail HARD Stats +1000<br>Snail All ELMT DMG +100<br>Eternity Treasure, Energy Recovery Speed +5%<br>Eternity Treasure, 5% chance to gain extra progress +1 per draw
|ss7=Snail HARD Stats +1000<br>Snail All ELMT DMG +100<br>Eternity Treasure, Energy Recovery Speed +5%<br>Eternity Treasure, 5% chance to gain extra progress +1 per draw<br>Eternity Treasure, Energy Recovery Speed +5% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Compass skill III.png|50px]]Place in Exploration Compass: In explorations, INTEL gained +15%
|skill2=[[File:Compass skill III.png|50px]]Place in Exploration Compass: In explorations, B-tads gained +15%
|skill3=[[File:Compass skill III.png|50px]]Place in Exploration Compass: In explorations, Demon God Cells collected +30%
|mirage={{Mirage|name=Sagittarius Star|reward={{RewardIconWithLink|Relic RF, +15|orange}}
|3name=Carnegie|3rec=9.17M|3atk=78319|3defense=51905|3hp=1803482|3weak=?
|4name=Churchill|4rec=16.52M|4atk=107212|4defense=71053|4hp=3219628|4weak=?
|5name=Marshal Zhukov|5rec=35.24M|5atk=141055|5defense=93482|5hp=5322279|5weak=?
|6name=Beethoven|6rec=54.81M|6atk=182584|6defense=121005|6hp=8636519|6weak=?
|Arec=77.11M|Aatk=229928|Adefense=152381|Ahp=13219303|Aweak=?
}}}}
